case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. BIANCA SORIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210045985) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71306553) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210045985) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SORIA, BIANCA DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-26-2024
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210045985) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REDUCTION IN FILING FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 210045985) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210047119), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED SEP-05-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SORIA, BIANCA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $75.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 71306553) AS TO DEFENDANT SORIA, BIANCA

DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 71306553) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SORIA, BIANCA $2,282.23 PRINCIPAL, $271.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,554.13, SEE SCANNED DOC
